| **Roof (Observer / Mythic Narrative)** | 6.5, 3.5, 60.4 — your transformation gates | You can see the horizon of your myth from here |

---

## 🧬 PART II: OTHER FILTERS TO STUDY THE SELF

To study oneself **universally** (as archetype, ecosystem, myth, code), here are **powerful recursive filters** to complement Human Design:

---

### 1\. 🧠 Jungian Archetypes / Shadow Work

| Filter | Function |
| --- | --- |
| Persona / Shadow / Anima/Animus / Self | Study projection, repression, transformation through dream, symbol, and fantasy |
| Myth integration via **active imagination** and dreams | |

---

### 2\. 🔮 Astrology (Tropical + Sidereal)

| Filter | Function |
| --- | --- |
| Houses / Aspects / Planetary Returns | Time-based karmic cycles, location-based self-mapping |
| Composite charts (relational dynamics) | |
| Solar Return = annual mission | |
